pi_items.metadata_value: Add a decorative border/frame around an image
pi_items.verified_value: Add a decorative border by enlarging the image with a configurable border region
pi_items.source: GIMP 2.10 documentation confirms: 'This filter just does what its name says: it adds a border to the image. The image will be enlarged by the border size'

pi_items.verified_value: Border X size, Border Y size, Border color, Delta value on color (for 3D effect)
pi_items.source: GIMP 2.10 Add Border documentation lists all parameters with ranges (Border X/Y up to 250px)

pi_items.metadata_value: At least 10 pixels in each dimension (5px per side minimum)
pi_items.source: Verifier code line 31-32 confirms this range, consistent with README

pi_items.verified_value: Verifier enforces: maximum 200px increase in each dimension
pi_items.source: Verifier code line 31-32 and README line 99 confirm this maximum

pi_items.metadata_value: Uniform color variance at edges with low variance threshold
pi_items.verified_value: Verifier checks edge color variance < 800 across RGB channels, requires 3/4 edges uniform
pi_items.source: Verifier code lines 63, 101 define uniformity as variance < 800

pi_items.metadata_value: Original content preserved with high similarity (SSIM >= 0.95)
pi_items.verified_value: Verifier requires SSIM >= 0.95 for content preservation check
pi_items.source: Verifier code line 149 sets similarity >= 0.95 threshold

pi_items.verified_value: Verifier score = (criteria_met / 4) * 100, pass requires score >= 75 (3/4 criteria)
pi_items.source: Verifier code lines 287-288 confirm scoring formula and pass threshold

pi_items.source: export_border.sh line 27 types 'bordered_image', verifier line 217 checks for bordered_image.jpg

privileged_info_summary: The border_frame task uses real Unsplash landscape images (800x533 JPEG RGB) downloaded from two URLs with fallback support. The primary image is from unsplash.com photo ID 1506905925346-21bda4d32df4. The task requires agents to use GIMP's Add Border filter (found at Filters → Decor → Add Border; note: task instructions incorrectly refer to it as just 'Border') to add a decorative border that increases image dimensions by 10-200 pixels in each direction. The verifier validates success through multi-criteria checks: dimension increase (10-200px), border detection via edge uniformity analysis (variance < 800, requiring 3/4 edges uniform), content preservation (SSIM ≥ 0.95 for center region), and image modification confirmation. Pass threshold is 75% (3/4 criteria met). The exported result is saved as bordered_image.jpg to /home/ga/Desktop/.
